dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The man who threatens the peace between the East and the West...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Donovan Desmond.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In order to get closer to him,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I successfully had Anya enroll in Eden College, the school his son attends.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Next, in order to attend the social gathering that Desmond goes to,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need Anya to obtain eight merits, called "Stella,"

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so that she can become an Imperial Scholar.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To make this all happen at a prestigious school, however, would not be easy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That is why I formulated a plan B, "The Friendship Scheme."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was hoping to have Anya get closer to Desmond's son, Damian,

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Come over!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: which in turn would hopefully connect us as their parents.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Welcome

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Thank you

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But on the first day, she ended up punching Damian,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: earned a Tonitrus Bolt, and left their friendship in shambles.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Alas, it is too early to give up.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This plan has only just begun.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: THE TARGET'S SECOND SON

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Good mworning...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Good morning, Yor. Breakfast is ready.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Looks like the three of us are getting used to life as a family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is Anya still asleep?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's still worried about what happened yesterday?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on out. I won't get mad.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Eat quickly, or you'll be late.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry I'm bad at school.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: No, that was my fault.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's no point to worrying about the past.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Just make sure you don't get into any more fights.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Okay, come on. Cheer up.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Your classes start today.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're so kind, Loid.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Figuring out what we can do next is far more constructive than dwelling on the past.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Besides, it would be much worse if she somehow

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: got sick of school and didn't want to go anymore.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need her school life to go as smoothly as possible for the sake of this mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, and make sure you apologize to Damian at school today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Got it?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep. Gonna go now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Do your best and be a good girl!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's time for us to head to work, too.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm counting on you, Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The peace of the world rests on you two making amends.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya will do her best.

dialogue.name: Driver
dialogue.speech: Have a wonderful day, Miss Becky.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Miss Rich Girl!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Oh, Anya. Good day to you.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Do you live in a castle, Miss Rich Girl?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Of course not.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You came here on the school bus?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I could have my driver give you a ride to and from school from now on.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Does that mean I get to be a Miss Rich Girl, too?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I never said anything about adopting you.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Aw, I'm jealous of the dorm kids who don't have to go to and from school.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Bleh...

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: What do you mean, "Bleh"? You rude little girl!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Ugh, it's only morning and you're already obnoxious.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: What's her problem?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Know your place!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Nyah!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Make sure you apologize.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um, yesterday, I...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Let's go, Anya. Our class is about to start.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Hey, wait!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You'll just catch their stupid if you keep talking to them.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But world peace!

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: He was worried, so he came to check on her

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Stop getting in the way, Blackbell girl!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, wait.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As I recall, Blackbell and the Desmond Group are actually business partners.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Could this girl be under orders from an enemyorganization to put a stop to our mission?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, calm down. That's not possible.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: First impressions are the most important thing when forming a group of friends at school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They must make amends today, no matter what.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You know...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Hm.

dialogue.name: Alice
dialogue.speech: That's the girl who got violent, right?

dialogue.name: Jesse
dialogue.speech: How scary! So barbaric.

dialogue.name: Sara
dialogue.speech: Is the girl next to her another delinquent?

dialogue.name: Johnny
dialogue.speech: She just hit him out of nowhere without a reason, right? That's nuts.

dialogue.name: Male student B
dialogue.speech: I don't want to be in the same class as her.

dialogue.name: Female student A
dialogue.speech: What if she hits me, too?

dialogue.name: Male student A
dialogue.speech: I can't believe she came to school. Talk about a pain.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: School is scary...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: People are so shallow.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: They can only judge what's on the surface.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Are you a smart person, Rich Girl?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Aw, I wouldn't say that.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: And call me Becky, not "Rich Girl."

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: All right, be seated.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I hope we become the best of friends.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm the only one who knows how good you are, Anya.

dialogue.name: Female student B
dialogue.speech: Honestly, people like that are just...

dialogue.name: Male student B
dialogue.speech: We'd better stay away from them.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: School is scary, but I think it might be okay.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Hey, look! Isn't this cute?

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Tch!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Why don't you give them a piece of your mind, Lord Damian?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's right. My name is Damian Desmond.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: All right, I'm calling the roll. Abel.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: As one of the sons of a prestigious family, I was born into a life of privilege.

dialogue.name: Abel
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Alice.

dialogue.name: Alice
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Edward.

dialogue.name: Edward
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: No one had ever defied me before.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Damian.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Yikes, the Desmond Group's chairman's son.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I've never even been hit by my older brother.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Mr. Desmond.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: And yet...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Mr. Desmond.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Conner.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: This is the first time I've had to deal with such...

dialogue.name: Conner
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: George.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: With such...

dialogue.name: George
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: With such...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Herman.

dialogue.name: Herman
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: With such...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Sara.

dialogue.name: Sara
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Johnny.

dialogue.name: Johnny
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Jesse.

dialogue.name: Jesse
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Carl.

dialogue.name: Carl
dialogue.speech: Here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Well, today will be our first lesson,

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: so before we begin...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: This is the starting line for all of you who worked so hard to get into this school...

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Math Class

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: As you can see in this example, when this and this are like this...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: And that's why this turns out like this, and this is... this.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: So you get this answer by doing this...

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: And if you get this answer, you can use the same method to get the answer over here.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: She had the nerve to fall asleep in first period on her first day.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Is she actually a delinquent?

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: How scary.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Anya!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: We have science class next. Wake up!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Second son!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I have to apologize to the second son.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Second son? You mean Damian?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: He already left.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: And just leave that loser alone.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But peace will be in trouble if I don't apologize to the second son.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You mean it'll put a damper on your peaceful school life?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I mean, yeah... Who knows what that boy will try to do?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: But don't worry.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm on your side, Anya!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'll protect you, no matter what.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Oh, it's okay, then.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, it's not!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need a way to tell her how important that apology is!

dialogue.name: Instructor (Science)
dialogue.speech: As you can see, you can reflect the sun's rays using a mirror.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Science Class

dialogue.name: Instructor (Science)
dialogue.speech: The spot where the light hits will feel warm.

dialogue.name: Instructor (Science)
dialogue.speech: Next, let's try an experiment using two mirrors.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: "Fortune for Good Little Children"It is good to apologize today.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Is that you, God?!

dialogue.name: Instructor (Science)
dialogue.speech: We will use the other mirror to reflect the light from earlier.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Apologize, Anya. Reconcile with him.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I suddenly feel this intense pressure.

dialogue.name: Male student C
dialogue.speech: "And that's when John made up his mind.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Language Class

dialogue.name: Male student C
dialogue.speech: Even if he were to be left out, he was going to see his beliefs through.

dialogue.name: Male student C
dialogue.speech: And then John never apologized to anyone ever again."

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: "But then John reflected upon his actions"

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: "and thought, 'Sometimes, it's just better to admit you're wrong and get along with others.'"

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My textbook seems different from everyone else's...

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Lunchtime

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: It's finally time for lunch. Let's go to the cafeteria.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I guess this really is a prestigious school.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: We're getting pretty brutal lessons from day one.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm exhausted.

dialogue.name: Female Instructor
dialogue.speech: New students, you can order whatever you'd like for lunch.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Cafeteria

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Huh... Well, they're nowhere near as talented as my chef.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya wants omelet rice.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What a bizarre dish.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Second son!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Ew, go eat in your dorm.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I have to apologize.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: No, you don't.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: They're the ones at fault.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That stupid little brat!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's it. I need to get her away from Anya.

dialogue.name: Senior waiter
dialogue.speech: Hey, newbie! Where are you going?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Becky Blackbell from Class -.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come to the student hall in Tower A immediately.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Huh? But I'm still eating.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Ugh!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Now's my chance to apologize.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Wh-What do you want?! You wanna fight again?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um—

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: If you hadn't sucker punched him, Lord Damian never would've lost to you!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Shut up, you two.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Huh? I see. You're going to personally give her what for!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Why do I find it so hard to speak when she's in front of me?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Lord Damian?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: What is this awkward sensation I'm feeling in my chest?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I feel a weird chill. I betterapologize quick, then run away.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Knowing Lord Damian,

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: I'm sure he's finding the absolute perfect insults to rip this little girl to shreds!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: I wonder what he'll go for? "Shrimp"?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: No, that is far too meek.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Super uggo? Raccoon face?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Violent gorilla girl?

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: She's even got those lame hair things that look like horns.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Y-Yesterday...

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Your momma's so fat...

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: You've got stubby little legs.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Stubby little legs!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: She's even got those lame hair things that look like horns.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Raccoon-faced commoner!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: You'll get your filthy commoner germs on us.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Go away, you stubby little raccoon.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: With stubby little legs...

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Stubby little legs!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm r-really sorry...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: that I suddenly hit you yesterday!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I just wanted...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: to be friends with you.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: for having stubby little legs.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Sh-She felt so bad that she's actually bawling?!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She's so demure.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess I didn't really need to interfere.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well done, Anya. Good job apologizing.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Lord Damian, your face is bright red.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's just because... I'm enraged!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I would never...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's right. She defied me! Right to my face!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Yes...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She came right up to me...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Stared deep into my eyes...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: N-No! That's not what's going on!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Stop pounding, my stupid heart!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She's a commoner! I would never...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: No, never!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's just too embarrassing.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Damn it all! I'd rather die than ever admit it!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I will never forgive you! My pride will not allow it!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Well said, Lord Damian! A woman's tears cannot sway him!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: We'll let you off the hook for today.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Lord Damian!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Her apology... was completely rejected?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Plan B is done for.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: By the way, why are we running?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Shut up!

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Relationship with Damian:

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: School is... scary.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Becky!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Who was it?! Who the heck called me out here?!

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Tower A Student Hall

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That makes the denominator three, and you get one-third.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Which means you have three thirds, which is equal to one.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Simple, right?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: L-Loid, why don't you both take a break?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Absolutely not. She has to learn at least this much by today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The incident with Damian the other day...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The "Friendship Scheme" that was meant to bring us closer to the Desmonds...

dialogue.name: flashbackDamian
dialogue.speech: I will never forgive you!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: completely fell apart.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Which means we need to go with the orthodox method of Plan A,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and boost its chances of success as much as possible.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you don't finish this, you don't get to watch your spy cartoon tonight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well? What's the answer here?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'll finish this quick by reading Papa's mind.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on. You use this formula here...

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: In order to get the Stella needed to become an Imperial Scholar,

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: there are other methods such as excelling in sports

xml.narration: If her grades deviate too much from the norm, it might make people suspicious, which would make the school wary of her, and the Desmonds...There are other methods such as excelling in sports or doing community service, But in order to halt getting Tonitrus Bolts from bad grades or being expelled from them, we need to get her academic skills up so she can get stable grades. If Anya puts in the effort...Carelessly becoming someone else in order to infiltrate and get close to someone is risky. If the worst happens, WISE won't keep quiet, since they're already on high alert against Western spies. Which means we basically need to proceed with caution...I could enter the faculty room and alter documents, though honestly, the most absolute way to get to the social gathering is to infiltrate it, but over the past few years, fellow agents have...But as far as the process goes, the best way to maximize academic efficiency within the family...

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: or doing community service.

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: But in order to halt getting Tonitrus Bolts from bad grades

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: Though honestly, the most absolute way to get to the social gathering

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: or being expelled from them, we need to get her academic skills up.

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: is to infiltrate it, but over the past few years, fellow agents have...

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: I could enter the faculty roomand alter documents...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right, Miss Anya?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I will read Mama's mind.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama, this question...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's think it over together.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's see... The denominator is five, so that's one split into five.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um... To make this easier to understand,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: let's rip all four limbs off of a torso...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, but then the head gets in the way.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Um...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Five... Five?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Doesn't a five look like an S?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right, Miss Anya?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's wrong? Well? Why can't you solve this?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I honestly can't figure out what it is she can't understand.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't wanna study!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, wait a minute!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: L-Loid...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I don't think it's a good idea to be too forceful at times like this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes, but she needs to study more to become an Imperial Scholar.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But is that something she wants for herself?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's actually for my mission.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I would really like Miss Anya to enjoy going to school.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Of course, she may need to studyso that she doesn't get expelled.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes... You're right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's still very young,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so getting good grades is probably the least of her worries.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I'm sorry.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I shouldn't butt into another family's affairs.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, it's quite all right. Thank you, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I do lose my composure with her at times.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sure other parents go through the same thing.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's take a break.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'll make us some tea.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya, we made you some hot cocoa.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And now she's holed up in her room.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I guess she's sulking now.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna do my best in school!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: She reminds me of my little brother when he was small.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: She'll come out eventually.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: By the way, your brother works for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, right?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He must have a brilliant academic record.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Did you help him with his homework?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you have any tips for me...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. Yuri was a much more capable child than I was.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm embarrassed to admit it, but he probably taught me more than I taught him.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Whenever we'd study together...

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: No, Sis. Spiders actually aren't insects.

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Insects have six legs,

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: and their bodies are split up between their head, thorax, and abdomen.

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: Wow... You're so knowledgeable, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Whenever I complimented him, his smile would light up the room.

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis! Next, I'll teach you history!

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: S-Sure...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He must've enjoyed teaching me things,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: because he'd always study on his own even when I left him alone.

dialogue.name: Young Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis, wake up! I learned my times tables! Listen!

dialogue.name: Young Yor
dialogue.speech: Mrfh...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see. So part of his motivation was earning your praise.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm not so sure about that,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but if that is the case, perhaps you can be someone like that for Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It might be worth it to praise her for the smallest things.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I think that'll make Miss Anya happy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well... I'm not so sure about that.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not her real father, after all.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wait, no.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's right. I need to be the ideal father.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to play that part.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That was the foundation of this mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But up until now, nothing has been ideal,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and as a father, I've been...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's all right.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Please be more confident in yourself.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Don't you remember what Miss Anya said?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That we're a perfect points.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: To Miss Anya, you're a wonderful father.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm grateful to hear you say that.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. I butted in as a stranger again.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're not a stranger, nor part of someone else's family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Right now, you're the mother of the Forgers.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm counting on you to provide whatever I'm lacking.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Th-That's right. I'm actually someone's wife.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't say things like that when we're out of the house.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It would be great if you could look over Anya's homework, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Of course, if you think I can be of help.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's take our time and do our best together.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's right. Don't panic, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If this could be ended by assassinating Desmond alone,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: there would be countless methods,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but that won't get us to a true solution.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Nothing goes well in a short amount of time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You need to know what your targetis thinking, what they desire,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: then gain their trust and get close to them so you can keep an eye on them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Completing such mundane missions that require patience makes a true spy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: First, I need to truly understand Anya.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, look at the time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll go have a chat with Anya.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Then I'll go ahead and do the dishes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, Anya. Your spy show's about to start.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry about earlier.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's watch your show first,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and then we can figure out what to do about your studies.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She fell asleep.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're going to catch a cold.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She was studying on her own?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I have to get the best grades on my tests for Papa...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess I'll just record that show for her.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: No, Mama. You can't k*ll Papa...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What exactly is she dreaming about?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Zzz...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A wonderful father, huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I wonder what it'd feel like to have a real family.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Heya, Yuri! Working hard, I see!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, it's been a while, Dominic.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I've been so busy with work that I haven't been home at all.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Elites at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs sure are cut from a different cloth.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Oh, yeah. Dominic, how was the party the other day?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What was the guy my sister went with like?

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Oh, Yor's...

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Ah... Actually, congrats, by the way.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Wait, you haven't met him yet?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: My sister got married?
